query:
DELETE FROM deployments;

INSERT INTO deployments (deploymentId, releaseName, deploymentDate, deploymentOwner, productOwner, platform, type, status, summary, environment, relatedBatch, relatedFeature, relatedStory) VALUES
('DEP-2026-0611-001', 'Known Mappings Lookup Fix (Bug 1401152)', '2026-06-11', 'Gary Luca', 'Stephane Lacombe', 'TDC', 'Bug', 'Deployed', 'The Known Mappings Lookup Fix has been deployed. The known mapping lookup endpoint now returns the most recent LOCKED mapping during entity reprocessing scenarios.', 'Production', NULL, NULL, 'Bug 1401152'),
('DEP-2026-0611-002', 'TDC API Route Standardization', '2026-06-11', 'Gary Luca', 'Stephane Lacombe', 'TDC', 'Technical Story', 'Deployed', 'TDC API routes have been standardized across all endpoints to align with the DCT API contract governance model. All route patterns now follow the established naming convention.', 'Production', NULL, NULL, NULL),
('DEP-2026-0611-003', 'Many-to-Many Form Line Mapping & Jurisdiction-Aware Derivation', '2026-06-11', 'Gary Luca', 'Stephane Lacombe', 'TDC', 'Feature', 'Deployed', 'Many-to-many form line mapping is now supported. Jurisdiction-aware derivation logic has been implemented to correctly resolve tax form line assignments across multi-jurisdiction entities.', 'Production', 'B10', 'Return Assembly, Filing & Lineage', NULL),
('DEP-2026-0611-004', 'Batch 10 Return Assembly, Filing & Lineage Closure', '2026-06-11', 'Gary Luca', 'Stephane Lacombe', 'TDC', 'Batch', 'Deployed', 'Batch 10 Return Assembly, Filing & Lineage Closure has been deployed to production. All gate criteria for G1 Schema Lock, G2 Invariant Lock, G3 Contract Publication, and G4 Lineage Closure have been verified and closed.', 'Production', 'B10', 'Return Assembly, Filing & Lineage', NULL),
('DEP-2026-0611-005', 'PDC Known Mappings: Confirmed Classification Retrieval, Reviewer Override/Manual Classify, Stable Record Identifier', '2026-06-11', 'Nasar Abbas', 'Stephane Lacombe', 'PDC', 'Technical Story', 'Deployed', 'PDC Known Mappings feature set has been deployed. This release includes confirmed classification retrieval for locked mappings, reviewer override and manual classification capabilities, and a stable record identifier for audit traceability across reprocessing cycles.', 'Production', NULL, 'Known Mappings', NULL);
